fields.description: Which image to bake. The recipe names the committed source tree, the build entrypoint, and the build-VM sizing (atlas.atlas.image_recipes).
fields.label: Recipe

fields.description: Denormalized from the recipe for the list view.
fields.label: Title

fields.description: The Active server the scratch build VM is provisioned on. For a proxy recipe this also fixes the region.
fields.label: Server

fields.description: Proxy builds only — the region the proxy image serves. Required for a proxy recipe.
fields.label: Region

fields.description: Draft → Provisioning → Building → Snapshotting → Available / Failed.
fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Draft
Provisioning
Building
Snapshotting
Available
Failed

fields.description: The stock Ubuntu base image the build VM boots. Defaults to Atlas Settings' default user image.
fields.label: Base Image

fields.description: If set and the recipe supports it, wire the produced snapshot into Atlas Settings on success (bench → default_bench_snapshot). Ignored by recipes with nothing to register (proxy).
fields.label: Auto-register snapshot

fields.description: If set, terminate the scratch build VM after a successful snapshot. The snapshot is durable and outlives the build VM. Off keeps it Stopped for re-bake / inspection.
fields.label: Terminate build VM after snapshot

fields.description: The scratch VM this build provisioned and baked.
fields.label: Build VM

fields.description: The output: the snapshot site/proxy VMs clone from.
fields.label: Snapshot

fields.description: The Task row recording the in-guest build.sh run (stdout/stderr/exit).
fields.label: Build Task

fields.description: The failure tail on Failed (full log in the Build Task).
fields.label: Error
